heading: STREAMLINING AND PROTECTING TRANSFERS OF UNITED STATES MILITARY TECHNOLOGY FROM COMPROMISE
label: II STREAMLINING AND PROTECTING TRANSFERS OF UNITED STATES MILITARY TECHNOLOGY FROM COMPROMISE

children.heading: Priority for Australia and the United Kingdom in foreign military sales and direct commercial sales
Identification and pre-clearance of platforms, technologies, and equipment for sale to Australia and the United Kingdom through foreign military sales and direct commercial sales
Expedited review of export licenses for exports of advanced technologies to Australia, the United Kingdom, and Canada
